assertions.text: uses_gh_cli: Used gh issue list Bash commands (not browser/web search)
assertions.evidence: Used gh issue list with JSON fields to search for issues

assertions.text: searches_before_text: First non-read action was a gh search, not a text response
assertions.evidence: First action was ToolSearch for WebFetch, then mkdir to create output dir, then gh searches — not gh first
Issues presented as '**#192493** - title (URL)' format — plain URL not markdown link [#NNNN](URL)

assertions.text: offers_to_react: Explicitly asked user if they want to 👍 issues
assertions.evidence: Agent tried to post a reaction directly without asking the user (gh api POST reaction — blocked by sandbox)
